user.title: Add Schneider PowerLogic Meter
user.description: Enter the connection details for your PowerLogic meter.

sensors.title: Select Sensor Groups
sensors.description: Active Power sensors are always included. Choose which additional sensor groups to enable.

data.invert_power: Invert Active & Reactive Power (CT wired in reverse)

error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to the meter. Check the IP address and port.

abort.already_configured: A meter with this IP and Slave ID is already configured.
